description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a distinctive ventilated barrel shroud featuring multiple circular holes along its length. The upper receiver and barrel area display a gradient color scheme transitioning from red at the rear to a silvery white at the front, while the lower receiver and grip are matte black. The magazine is extended and box-shaped, with a blue-green tint, suggesting a high-capacity design. The grip is ergonomic and pistol-style, and the trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall build is sleek and utilitarian, with minimal external attachments, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments. The shotgun's design emphasizes portability and rapid handling, with a short barrel and compact frame.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a ventilated barrel shroud, gradient red-to-white upper receiver, and a black ergonomic pistol grip. Features an extended blue-green magazine and a robust rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, prominent barrel vent holes, and the symmetrical alignment of the shroud.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gradient color transition, ventilated barrel, extended magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact stock area, top rail, and the overall width of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same color gradient, magazine, and grip, with additional detail on the ejection port and charging handle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ventilated shroud featuring multiple circular holes
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
